text:
Once upon an autumn day in sleepy Willowdale...

A young fox looked out her window and saw something unusual--a beautiful old oak tree.

Every year she would decorate it Halloween decorations. But this year was different. Nothing glittered above its branches!

Forging ahead eagerly, she snached an enormous carrot and hung it highest. She sighed dreaming. Maybe even some pretty owls...

As dusk dressed the sky, she peeked again.

The owl sat... silent... staring.

She took its head. Something felt terribly wrong...

And so...

She discovered...

It wasn’T sick.

It was wise.



With one perfect feather.

* * *

Willowdale wasn't quite owl-worthy.

But our clever girl was anything but.




She knew...

She cared.

As moonlight stole through leaves.

Something… something good...

Maybe... maybe just maybe...

Just maybe...


You're wise. That's wonderful.
And it's something.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
